input.description: Get updated wave plan after Wave 1 completion

text:
Wave 1 is complete. All 5 features are released. Here's the full summary:

---

## Wave 1 Complete — `install-onboarding-polish`

**Progress: 5/5 released** (was 0/5 at start)

| Feature | What was done |
|---|---|
| `init-error-filenames` | `sdlc init` errors now include full file paths (e.g. `failed to create /path/.sdlc: Permission denied`) |
| `readme-install-guide` | README `## Quickstart` now leads with SSH URL, adds `make install` from-source section, links to `DEVELOPER.md` |
| `sdlc-update-docs` | README has new `### Updating` section explaining `sdlc update` after binary upgrades; `sdlc init` completion message now points to `sdlc ui` → `/setup` |
| `setup-vision-arch-guidance` | README "First steps" section added; SetupPage Vision/Architecture subtitles clarified; Dashboard banner warns when Vision or Architecture is missing |
| `sse-state-consistency` | `UatHistoryPanel` now auto-refreshes on `milestone_uat` SSE events; `SettingsPage` clears stale error state on refresh |

**Updated wave plan:** No remaining waves — milestone is in `verifying` phase with 0 in-progress features. Next step is milestone UAT (`/sdlc-milestone-uat install-onboarding-polish`).

The only open items are 5 minor warnings about missing feature descriptions (no functional impact).
